scripts.deploy: npm run build:lib && npm pack --dry-run --cache .npm-cache && npm publish --access public --cache .npm-cache --otp=$npm_config_otp
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && npm run build:lib && npm publish --access public --otp=$npm_config_otp
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && npm run build:lib && npm publish --access public --otp=$npm_config_otp
scripts.release:major: npm version major && npm run build:lib && npm publish --access public --otp=$npm_config_otp
